info.title: Big Bolão API
info.description: API for managing pools, predictions, and tournaments

message.example: User is not a member of this pool

tournamentId.description: Tournament ID this pool belongs to

participantsCount.description: Number of participants in the pool

isOwner.description: Whether user is the pool owner

count.description: Total number of users in the pool

message.example: Only pool owner can perform this action
Pool owner cannot leave their own pool

id.description: User ID (optional, will be generated if not provided)

poolId.description: Optional pool ID to filter predictions

pointsRatio.description: The user's score as a percentage of the total possible score.

guessRatio.description: The percentage of the user's correct guesses relative to the total number of matches to be predicted.

predictionsRatio.description: The percentage of predictions the user has submitted out of the total number of matches to be predicted.

post.description: Creates a new user account with email, password, full name and profile image

id.description: User ID (optional, will be generated if not provided)

put.description: Updates user profile information (email, full name, profile image)

get.description: Retrieves user profile information by user ID
Retrieves the authenticated user's profile information
Retrieves all pools that the specified user participates in
Retrieves all predictions made by the authenticated user, optionally filtered by pool

parameters.name: poolId
parameters.description: Optional pool ID to filter predictions

get.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's standings across all pools they participate in

guessRatio.description: The percentage of the user's correct guesses relative to the total number of matches to be predicted.

predictionsRatio.description: The percentage of predictions the user has submitted out of the total number of matches to be predicted.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific match including team details and tournament information

put.description: Updates match details including scores, status, and other match information (admin only)

get.description: Retrieves all predictions made for a specific match across all pools the user has access to
Lists public pools with optional pagination and name filtering
